name: Dimerix Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 66% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2250, stop A$0.1559, target A$0.2500 (0.36:1) — then trail it.
